response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the on-screen lyrics and the provided song contexts. Identified three distinct parts: the conclusion of 'Guru Guru Mawaro Mawa Luna', the full performance of 'Mannakachiten', and 'Mamotte Lu-Knight', followed by an MC segment. Timing is strictly synchronized with vocal activation. English translations preserve the character's 'princess' persona and signature speech style ('nanora').

subtitles.original: もっと
subtitles.english: More

subtitles.original: ぐるぐるまわって
subtitles.english: Spinning round and round

subtitles.original: ル〜ナ
subtitles.english: Lu~na

subtitles.original: ぐるぐるまわるの
subtitles.english: Spinning round and round

subtitles.original: まわル〜ナ
subtitles.english: Spinning Lu~na

subtitles.original: やあ！
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: いつもおとぎ話のお姫様
subtitles.english: Always a princess from a fairy tale,

subtitles.original: みんなの輝くお月様
subtitles.english: everyone's shining moon.

subtitles.original: 今日はお休みして
subtitles.english: Resting today,

subtitles.original: 重たい王冠今は置いといて
subtitles.english: setting aside the heavy crown for now.

subtitles.original: どっちの私も好きになってくれますか？
subtitles.english: Will you fall in love with both sides of me?

subtitles.original: どっちも欲しいから まんなかにいたくなるの
subtitles.english: Because I want both, I want to be in the center.

subtitles.original: スニーカーとシャツに着替えて
subtitles.english: Changing into sneakers and a shirt,

subtitles.original: 歩き出したんだ
subtitles.english: I've started walking.

subtitles.original: 出発のアラームは新しい
subtitles.english: The departure alarm is new,

subtitles.original: 私が鳴らしてあげる
subtitles.english: and I'll ring it for you.

subtitles.original: 両腕をいっぱいにしても
subtitles.english: Even with my arms full,

subtitles.original: ぎゅっとしたい
subtitles.english: I want to hold you tight.

subtitles.original: この気持ち入らない
subtitles.english: These feelings won't fit.

subtitles.original: 片っぽなんて選べない
subtitles.english: I can't choose just one side.

subtitles.original: 迷ってるならまんなかなんだよ
subtitles.english: If you're lost, it's the center.

subtitles.original: まんがいの青春
subtitles.english: Youth in full bloom,

subtitles.original: まんぷくに摂取
subtitles.english: a full stomach intake.

subtitles.original: まてんりゅうせいぐん
subtitles.english: Skyscraper meteor shower,

subtitles.original: まんでび in heaven
subtitles.english: Man-devi in heaven.

subtitles.original: まんめん笑顔にして
subtitles.english: With a full smile,

subtitles.original: まんてんすぎる思い出
subtitles.english: memories that are more than perfect.

subtitles.original: まーまるーな Happy day!!
subtitles.english: Mawa-Luna Happy day!!

subtitles.original: 愛のまんなかてん
subtitles.english: At the center point of love,

subtitles.original: プリンセスを忘れるくらい
subtitles.english: so much you forget the princess.

subtitles.original: 胸まんたんにきゅんとしてみたい
subtitles.english: I want to feel my heart full of "kyun."

subtitles.original: どっちだってホントの私
subtitles.english: Whichever it is, it's the real me.

subtitles.original: 瞬きしたら君のどまんなか
subtitles.english: If you blink, I'll be in your center.

subtitles.original: まんなかに重なるちてん
subtitles.english: The point overlapping in the center.

subtitles.original: まんなかで欲張るちてん
subtitles.english: The point being greedy in the center.

subtitles.original: まんなかのまんなかちてん
subtitles.english: The center point of the center.

subtitles.original: 恋する女の子のいいとこ取りで
subtitles.english: Taking the best of a girl in love,

subtitles.original: 照れ隠しと素顔の今 まんなかちてん
subtitles.english: the point between shyness and my true face.

subtitles.original: 跪きなさい。
subtitles.english: Kneel down.

subtitles.original: 汝、この城の扉を叩いたものよ。
subtitles.english: Thou who has knocked on the gates of this castle.

subtitles.original: 誓いなさい。
subtitles.english: Vow.

subtitles.original: このルーナの盾となり矛となり、
subtitles.english: To be the shield and spear for this Luna,

subtitles.original: 夜はぐっすり眠れるまで、
subtitles.english: until you can sleep soundly at night,

subtitles.original: 共にあることを！
subtitles.english: to be together!

subtitles.original: 捧げなさい！
subtitles.english: Offer it up!

subtitles.original: 姫であるぞ！
subtitles.english: I am the princess!

subtitles.original: 止まるな！
subtitles.english: Don't stop!

subtitles.original: 紅茶のカップ かちゃかちゃ鳴らさないで えらい！
subtitles.english: Don't clink your tea cup, well done!

subtitles.original: スコーンだって 零さず綺麗に食べて すごい！
subtitles.english: You ate the scone without spilling, amazing!

subtitles.original: たまに王冠 どっちが前か間違っちゃうの かわいい！
subtitles.english: I put my crown on backwards sometimes, cute!

subtitles.original: 通ってよし！ なのら！
subtitles.english: You may pass! Nanora!

subtitles.original: 開城〜！
subtitles.english: Open the gates~!

subtitles.original: 第一条！
subtitles.english: Article 1!

subtitles.original: 誰よりルーナが好きな人！
subtitles.english: The person who loves Luna more than anyone!

subtitles.original: 第二条！
subtitles.english: Article 2!

subtitles.original: シルクのお布団持ってきて！
subtitles.english: Bring me a silk futon!

subtitles.original: 第三条！
subtitles.english: Article 3!

subtitles.original: 三時のお茶会来れる人！
subtitles.english: The person who can come to the 3 PM tea party!

subtitles.original: 守れなかったら即制裁！
subtitles.english: If you can't keep them, immediate punishment!

subtitles.original: 分かってほしいのら
subtitles.english: I want you to understand,

subtitles.original: これも帝王学を学ぶため…
subtitles.english: this is also for studying monarchism...

subtitles.original: 愛という名の教育なのら〜！
subtitles.english: It's an education in the name of love!

subtitles.original: 守ってルーナイト 想ってくんないと
subtitles.english: Protect me, Lu-Knight, or you'll have to think of me,

subtitles.original: プロムナード ボイコット なのののら！
subtitles.english: promenade boycott, nano-nora!

subtitles.original: 手の甲に忠誠 誓えるの？ チュッ
subtitles.english: Can you swear loyalty on the back of my hand? *Kiss*

subtitles.original: ガラスの靴 履かせてワルツ！
subtitles.english: Let me wear the glass slippers and waltz!

subtitles.original: 守ってルーナイト かまってくんないと
subtitles.english: Protect me, Lu-Knight, or you'll have to look after me.

subtitles.original: ブラウニーにキャンディー どれだけあってもね
subtitles.english: Brownies and candies, no matter how many there are,

subtitles.original: 君がいなきゃだめ みんな心して
subtitles.english: it's no good without you. Everyone, take heed,

subtitles.original: 捧げなさい！ 姫であるぞ！
subtitles.english: offer it up! I am the princess!

subtitles.original: 守ってルーナイト 想ってくんないと
subtitles.english: Protect me, Lu-Knight, or you'll have to think of me,

subtitles.original: プロムナード ボイコット なのののら！
subtitles.english: promenade boycott, nano-nora!

subtitles.original: 永遠の忠誠 この指に チュッ
subtitles.english: Eternal loyalty on this finger, *Kiss*

subtitles.original: ガラスの靴 履かせてワルツ！
subtitles.english: Let me wear the glass slippers and waltz!

subtitles.original: 守ってルーナイト かまってくんないと
subtitles.english: Protect me, Lu-Knight, or you'll have to look after me.

subtitles.original: ブラウニーにキャンディー どれだけあってもね
subtitles.english: Brownies and candies, no matter how many there are,

subtitles.original: 君がいなきゃだめ みんな心して
subtitles.english: it's no good without you. Everyone, take heed,

subtitles.original: 捧げなさい！ 姫であるぞ！
subtitles.english: offer it up! I am the princess!

subtitles.original: んな〜い！
subtitles.english: Nnaa-i!

subtitles.original: みんなおりょ〜！
subtitles.english: Everyone, oryoo~!

subtitles.original: ホロライブ4期生、姫森ルーナなのら〜！
subtitles.english: Hololive 4th Gen, Himemori Luna nanora~!

subtitles.original: 今日はルーナの生誕祭ライブ！
subtitles.english: Today is Luna's Birthday Festival Live!

subtitles.original: いぇ〜い！
subtitles.english: Yay~!

subtitles.original: みんな来てくれてありがと〜！
subtitles.english: Thank you all for coming~!

subtitles.original: 今日のハッシュタグはこちら！
subtitles.english: Today's hashtag is this!

subtitles.original: デデン！
subtitles.english: Ta-da!

subtitles.original: ＃姫森ルーナ生誕ライブ2025
subtitles.english: #HimemoriLunaBirthdayLive2025

subtitles.original: これでいっぱいツイートしてください！
subtitles.english: Please tweet a lot with this!
